title: aeschynanthus flavidus
intro: Aeschynanthus flavidus, also known as the 'Golden Lip' or 'Mystical Lip Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Western Ghats in India and is valued for its medicinal properties and ornamental value. Traditionally, Aeschynanthus flavidus is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
